_comment: LocalMask detection patterns — editable without touching code. Loaded at runtime by regex_rules_safe.py. Each entry: {pattern, confidence, level, reason}.

openai_project_key.reason: OpenAI project / service-account / admin API key

stripe_key.reason: Stripe secret key (sk_live_/sk_test_ only; pk_ publishable keys are public)

azure_sql_connection.reason: Azure SQL connection string with password

json_camelcase_apikey.reason: API key in JSON camelCase key

datadog_prefixed_key.reason: Datadog API/app key with dd_ prefix (including org-prefixed keys like dd_acme_...)

password_assignment.reason: Password assignment (no-space value to exclude error messages)

phone_us.reason: US/CA phone number (+1, (NXX), or NXX-NXX-XXXX format)

labeled_phone.reason: Phone number preceded by phone/tel/mobile/fax keyword

phone_uk.reason: UK phone number (+44 international, +44 (0)XX notation, or 07XXX mobile format)

labeled_address.reason: Street address after labeled field (address:/billing_address=/shipping_address: etc.) — requires at least one digit in value to skip null/N/A placeholders

labeled_dob.reason: Date of birth — top-tier PII; keyword-anchored on dob/date_of_birth/birthdate; accepts DD/MM/YYYY, MM/DD/YYYY, and ISO YYYY-MM-DD formats

labeled_passport_no.reason: Passport number — keyword-anchored; value: 1-2 uppercase letters + 6-9 digits (most countries) or 7-9 all-digit (UK/some EU). (?-i:...) guards against lowercase FPs.

labeled_national_id.reason: Generic national ID / government ID — keyword-anchored; value must contain a digit (blocks label-to-label variable assignments)

uk_national_insurance.reason: UK National Insurance / social / tax reference number

labeled_gps.reason: GPS latitude value — keyword-anchored on lat/latitude; 4+ decimal places required to avoid version/IP false positives (location PII)

labeled_gps_lon.reason: GPS longitude value — keyword-anchored on lon/longitude/lng; 4+ decimal places required to avoid version/IP false positives (location PII)

postal_code_uk.reason: UK postcode (e.g. SW1A 1AA, M1 1AE, DN55 1PT) — distinctive letter/digit alternating format, low FP risk

postal_code_us_zip4.reason: US ZIP+4 code (NNNNN-NNNN) — the +4 extension makes it specific enough for standalone detection

postal_code_ca.reason: Canadian postal code (A1A 1A1 letter-digit alternating format)

street_address_en.reason: English-format street address (number + 1-4 name words + street-type suffix). Also catches Hebrew/other addresses written in English e.g. '5 Herzl Street'. Confidence 0.78 reflects heuristic nature of Tier 3.

labeled_customer_id.reason: Customer/account/member/order/invoice/booking/contract ID in labeled field — [:=] separator required; value must contain a digit. Language-specific keywords live in lang packs.

prefixed_customer_id.reason: Structured ID with recognisable prefix (CUST-12345, ACC-001234, ORD-789, INV-001, TXN-abc123). Digit requirement in suffix prevents matching constant names.

url_query_secret.reason: Secret embedded in URL query string (?api_key=, ?token=, ?password=, etc.) — common in webhook URLs, log lines, and git history

url_in_assignment.reason: URL assigned to a config/env key

url_internal_ip.reason: URL pointing to a private IP address

iban.reason: IBAN bank account (mod-97 checksum-validated, any country)

vehicle_vin.reason: Vehicle VIN (bare, strict level — use labeled_vin for standard detection)

labeled_vin.reason: Vehicle VIN keyword-anchored (vin:/vehicle_id:/chassis_no:) with 17-char alphanumeric value. (?-i:...) enforces VIN uppercase spec and prevents FPs on lowercase strings.

labeled_license_plate.reason: Vehicle license plate / registration number — keyword-anchored on license_plate/reg/number_plate; value 5-12 alphanumeric chars in up to 3 groups

labeled_cvv.reason: Card CVV/CVC security code (3-4 digits) — keyword-anchored on cvv/cvc/security_code to prevent FP on arbitrary 3-digit values (PCI DSS)

labeled_card_expiry.reason: Card expiry date MM/YY or MM/YYYY — keyword-anchored; year constrained to 2020-2099 to avoid version-number FPs (PCI DSS)

k8s_hyphenated_secret.reason: Hyphenated secret key (k8s/yaml stringData) — rejects Go struct field references

generic_env_api_key.reason: Generic *_API_KEY / *_API_TOKEN env var (Cloudflare, Hetzner, Dynu, OVH, etc.)

sql_ddl_password.reason: SQL DDL password (IDENTIFIED BY, SET PASSWORD, CREATE USER)

yaml_password.reason: Password/secret field in YAML (quoted or unquoted)

yaml_image.reason: image: in Docker Compose / K8s YAML

py_os_environ_secret.reason: os.environ access to secret env var name

boto3_hardcoded_key.reason: boto3 hardcoded AWS access key ID

boto3_hardcoded_secret.reason: boto3 hardcoded AWS secret access key

paramiko_password.reason: Paramiko SSH connect() with hardcoded password

subprocess_password_flag.reason: Password/secret passed as CLI flag to subprocess

subprocess_env_secret.reason: Secret injected into subprocess env dict

gcp_credentials_file.reason: GCP service account credentials file path

py_hardcoded_port_host.reason: Hardcoded IP address as host in Python

tf_consul_agent_token.reason: Consul/Nomad ACL agent/replication token (UUID) in HCL

xml_user_attr.reason: user/uid= attribute in XML connection string

xml_server_attr.reason: server/Data Source in XML connection string

xml_appkey.reason: appSettings key with secret value in XML

xml_connstr_userid.reason: User ID in semicolon-delimited connection string

js_process_env_secret.reason: process.env access to secret variable name

js_private_key_string.reason: Private key embedded in JS/TS string

js_internal_url.reason: Internal service URL assigned in JS/TS

cs_sql_server_name.reason: SQL Server name in C# connection string

go_os_getenv_secret.reason: os.Getenv access to secret variable name in Go

go_struct_secret.reason: Secret field in Go struct literal

dockerfile_run_password.reason: Secret passed to RUN command in Dockerfile

dockerfile_from_registry.reason: Internal registry image in FROM instruction

gradle_api_key.reason: API key in Gradle build file

swift_provide_api_key.reason: SDK API key configuration in Swift

ruby_env_secret.reason: Secret assigned via ENV[] in Ruby/Fastfile

prose_s3_bucket.reason: S3 bucket name (with account suffix) in prose

prose_user_line.reason: Username on its own line in prose

lang_packs._comment: Language packs — PII/secret patterns keyed by non-English keywords (Hebrew, Russian, Arabic, Spanish, French). Loaded into the universal set by regex_rules_safe.py; select with LOCALMASK_LANGS=he,ru (default: all, 'none' disables). Adding a language = adding a block here, no code changes. israeli_id and spanish_dni are checksum-validated in engine.py.

israeli_id.reason: Israeli ID number (Teudat Zehut, checksum-validated PII)

israeli_phone.reason: Israeli phone number — mobile (05X) and landline (02/03/04/08/09), with or without separators (PII)

postal_code_il.reason: Israeli postal code (7 digits, keyword-anchored — bare 7-digit is too common in code)

labeled_address_he.reason: Street address labeled in Hebrew (כתובת + colon/equals, PII) — catches both Hebrew and English addresses after the label

customer_id_he.reason: Customer ID in Hebrew (מספר לקוח/קוד לקוח/מזהה לקוח) — digit required in value to avoid matching variable-to-variable assignments

street_address_ru.reason: Russian street address (ул./улица/проспект/переулок + street name + house number, PII)

labeled_address_ru.reason: Street address labeled in Russian (адрес + colon/equals, PII)

customer_id_ru.reason: Customer ID in Russian (номер клиента/ID клиента/код клиента) — digit required in value

labeled_address_ar.reason: Street address labeled in Arabic (العنوان/عنوان + colon/equals, PII)

street_address_ar.reason: Arabic street address (شارع/طريق/جادة/ميدان + name words + house number, PII)

customer_id_ar.reason: Customer ID in Arabic (رقم العميل/معرف العميل/رقم الحساب) — digit required in value

spanish_phone.reason: Spanish phone number — mobile (6XX/7XX) and landline (8XX/9XX), 9 digits, any grouping (PII)

street_address_es.reason: Spanish street address (Calle/Avenida/Paseo/etc. + name + number) — capitalised street keyword anchors the match

customer_id_es.reason: Customer ID in Spanish (número de cliente/ID de cliente/código de cliente) — digit required in value

street_address_fr.reason: French street address (number + Rue/Boulevard/Allée/etc. + name) — street-type keyword anchors the match

customer_id_fr.reason: Customer ID in French (numéro client/identifiant client/code client) — digit required in value

postal_code_de.reason: German PLZ postal code (5 digits, keyword-anchored — bare 5-digit is too common in code)

customer_id_de.reason: Customer/account/order ID in German — includes Kundennummer, Kontonummer, Auftragsnummer (order), Rechnungsnummer (invoice), Buchungsnummer (booking), Vertragsnummer (contract)

street_address_de.reason: German street address — street type is embedded in compound word (Hauptstraße 42, Bahnhofstr. 5) making it very specific

italian_fiscal_code.reason: Italian codice fiscale (structured national ID, PII)

italian_phone.reason: Italian phone — mobile bare (3XX) or +39-prefixed mobile/landline; bare landlines omitted (too similar to generic digit strings, caught by labeled_phone)

postal_code_it.reason: Italian CAP postal code (5 digits, keyword-anchored)

customer_id_it.reason: Customer ID in Italian (numero/codice cliente) — digit required in value

street_address_it.reason: Italian street address (Via/Corso/Piazza + capitalized name + comma + number) — capitalisation requirement and mandatory comma cut FPs from 'via email' etc.

romanian_cnp.reason: Romanian CNP (Cod Numeric Personal, checksum-validated PII)

postal_code_ro.reason: Romanian postal code (6 digits, keyword-anchored to avoid FPs with plain numbers)

customer_id_ro.reason: Customer ID in Romanian (număr client / cod client) — digit required in value

indian_phone.reason: Indian mobile number (+91 prefix, or 10-digit with separator starting with 6-9, PII)

indian_pan.reason: Indian PAN card (AAAAA9999A — 5 uppercase letters + 4 digits + 1 letter, very distinctive format, PII). (?-i:...) forces uppercase-only to prevent IGNORECASE FPs on lowercase words+digits.

indian_aadhaar.reason: Indian Aadhaar (12-digit unique ID in XXXX XXXX XXXX groups, keyword-anchored, PII)

indian_pin.reason: Indian PIN code (6 digits starting 1-9, keyword-anchored — bare 6-digit is too common in code)

indian_gstin.reason: Indian GSTIN (15-char: 2-digit state code + PAN 10 chars + entity digit + Z + check — very distinctive structure, PII)

labeled_address_hi.reason: Street address labeled in Hindi (पता + colon/equals, catches Hindi and English addresses after the label, PII)

street_address_hi.reason: Hindi street address (गली/सड़क/मार्ग/नगर + Devanagari name words + house number, PII)

customer_id_hi.reason: Customer/account number in Hindi (ग्राहक संख्या/आईडी, खाता संख्या) — digit required in value to avoid matching variable names

money._comment: Finance Mode vocabulary — data-driven like everything else. categories: keyword→category for the per-category secret bases; extra_keywords: anchor words that make a bare number a money amount without deciding its category. Customers add their own terms here (or via the money section of settings) — no code changes.
